name: Gas
description: '''Gas''' (stylized as '''GAS''' or '''G A S''') is the main musical project of German [[electronic music|electronic]] musician and composer [[Wolfgang Voigt]] (born 1961). The project was created as an expressive medium inspired by his experiences with taking [[LSD]] in the [[:de:Königsforst|Königsforst]], a German forest situated near his hometown of [[Cologne]], for long periods in his youth. He has claimed that the intention of the project is to "bring the forest to the disco, or vice-versa".
